title: June 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 20''' is the 171st day of the year (172nd in leap years). There are 194 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 69|''Star Wars Weekly'' 69]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 53|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 53]] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]] published.
*2001 – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 5|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 5]] published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 2|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 2]] published.
*2012 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 5|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 5]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels: The Siege of Lothal|''The Siege of Lothal'']], the [[Star Wars Rebels Season Two|Season Two]] premiere of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'', airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2016]] – "[[A Hero Discovered]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – [[Poe Dameron 28|''Poe Dameron'' 28]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Jules Walter]] dies.
<noinclude>
